content:
💡 open_deep_research | Python
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide a flexible and open-source platform for conducting deep research tasks, allowing users to customize and integrate different AI models and search functionalities.
✨ Key Features: • Configurable agent for deep research • Supports multiple model providers • Integrates with various search tools • Compatible with MCP servers • Performance on par with leading deep research agents
📖 Summary: Open Deep Research is an open-source agent application designed for deep research tasks. It offers high configurability, supporting various model providers, search tools, and MCP servers, and aims to match the performance of popular commercial deep research agents.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
